name: sensor_in_the_loop_health_assistant
description: Reads real wearable/sensor health data for a user and constructs a structured context payload that lets an LLM generate personalised, data-grounded health advice. Covers daily status, sleep, exercise, stress, recovery, travel, and work readiness.

trigger.description: Activate this skill when the user asks about their health, body state, sleep, exercise, stress, fatigue, recovery, travel readiness, or work/meeting readiness.
example_queries: 我明天要开会，今天该怎么调整？
我最近是不是压力太大了？

functions.name: JianDataParser.build_daily_summary
functions.description: Load the health CSV file and return a structured snapshot of a single user's health data for one day. Covers activity, sleep, stress/HRV, and location-context dimensions.
functions.when_to_call: Call first, before any other function, to obtain today's raw health snapshot for the user.

user_id.description: The user identifier matching the 'id' column in the CSV file.

date.description: Target date in ISO-8601 format, e.g. '2021-07-31'.

returns.description: Nested dict with keys: user_id, date, profile, activity, sleep, stress, context.

functions.name: JianDataParser.build_7day_summary
functions.description: Compute rolling 7-day statistics (mean, std, trend label) for key health metrics ending on the given date.
functions.when_to_call: Call immediately after build_daily_summary to enrich the payload with trend context.

user_id.description: The user identifier matching the 'id' column in the CSV file.

date.description: End date of the 7-day window in ISO-8601 format.

returns.description: Dict with keys: user_id, date, window_days, metrics. Each metric entry contains latest, 7d_mean, 7d_std, trend_label.

functions.name: classify_question
functions.description: Classify the user's free-text question into one of six health topic categories using keyword matching.
functions.when_to_call: Call after build_daily_summary returns, passing the user's original question text.

user_query.description: The raw question text entered by the user.

returns.description: Category string that drives both query rewriting and the answer_focus hint.

functions.name: rewrite_query_locally
functions.description: Rewrite the user's question into a context-enriched version grounded in their health state, using rule-based templates (no external LLM required).
functions.when_to_call: Call after classify_question, passing the merged summary dict, the original query, and the question_type.

summary.description: Merged summary dict containing user_id, date, daily snapshot, and metrics.

user_query.description: The original question text entered by the user.

returns.description: A Chinese-language rewritten question that embeds relevant health context.

functions.name: build_payload
functions.description: Assemble the final structured context payload that OpenClaw passes to its LLM to generate a personalised health response.
functions.when_to_call: Call last, after rewrite_query_locally, to produce the output that OpenClaw consumes.

summary.description: Merged summary dict containing user_id, date, daily snapshot, and metrics.

original_query.description: The raw question text entered by the user.

returns.description: JSON-serialisable dict with fields: question_type, original_query, rewritten_query, user_state, answer_focus, output_style, do_not_show_chain_of_thought.

pipeline.description: Ordered sequence of function calls for a single skill invocation.

safety.disclaimer: This skill provides general wellness suggestions based on wearable data. It does not diagnose medical conditions, replace professional medical advice, or handle emergency health situations.
